requirement_topic.en: Regulatory Scope: Georgia PPE Framework — Not EAEU, GeoSTM National Standards Apply
requirement_topic.zh: 监管范围：格鲁吉亚PPE框架——非欧亚经济联盟，适用GeoSTM国家标准
requirement_topic.zht: 監管範圍：格魯吉亞PPE框架——非歐亞經濟聯盟，適用GeoSTM國家標準

summary.en: Georgia is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) and the EAEU Technical Regulation TR CU 019/2011 (On the Safety of Personal Protective Equipment) does NOT apply. Georgia operates its own national standards system under GeoSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology), the national body for standardisation and metrology. Georgia has an EU Association Agreement and DCFTA (Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area) with the European Union, resulting in a policy of gradual technical approximation towards EU standards — but EU Regulations such as PPE Regulation (EU) 2016/425 are not directly in force in Georgia. For respiratory PPE (filtering facepiece respirators / FFP masks), applicable Georgian standards are GOST-based (e.g., GOST 12.4.294, GOST 12.4.296, or adopted equivalents of EN 149) as administered by GeoSTM. Market surveillance is conducted by national authorities and is still evolving compared to EU or EAEU-member enforcement maturity.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，欧亚经济联盟技术法规TR CU 019/2011（《个人防护装备安全》）不适用于格鲁吉亚。格鲁吉亚通过GeoSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）运行其独立的国家标准体系，GeoSTM是负责标准化与计量的国家机构。格鲁吉亚与欧盟签有联系协议及深化全面自由贸易区协议（DCFTA），推动逐步向欧盟标准技术靠拢——但欧盟法规（如PPE法规（EU）2016/425）在格鲁吉亚并不直接生效。对于呼吸防护PPE（过滤式半面罩/FFP口罩），适用的格鲁吉亚标准以GOST为基础（如GOST 12.4.294、GOST 12.4.296或EN 149采标版本），由GeoSTM管理。市场监督由国家主管部门执行，与欧盟或欧亚经济联盟成员国的执法成熟度相比仍在发展完善中。
summary.zht: 格魯吉亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，歐亞經濟聯盟技術法規TR CU 019/2011（《個人防護裝備安全》）不適用於格魯吉亞。格魯吉亞通過GeoSTM（格魯吉亞國家標準與計量局）運行其獨立的國家標準體系，GeoSTM是負責標準化與計量的國家機構。格魯吉亞與歐盟簽有聯繫協議及深化全面自由貿易區協議（DCFTA），推動逐步向歐盟標準技術靠攏——但歐盟法規（如PPE法規（EU）2016/425）在格魯吉亞並不直接生效。對於呼吸防護PPE（過濾式半面罩/FFP口罩），適用的格魯吉亞標準以GOST為基礎（如GOST 12.4.294、GOST 12.4.296或EN 149採標版本），由GeoSTM管理。市場監督由國家主管部門執行，與歐盟或歐亞經濟聯盟成員國的執法成熟度相比仍在發展完善中。

standards_or_laws: GeoSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) — national standards authority
GOST 12.4.294 / GOST 12.4.296 — GOST-based respiratory protection standards (basis for Georgian national adoption)
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA (in force 2016) — technical approximation framework, not direct EU law adoption
TR CU 019/2011 — EAEU PPE Technical Regulation (NOT applicable to Georgia)

summary.en: China uses a three-track classification for respiratory masks: (1) GB 2626-2019 (KN95/KN90) for industrial/occupational respirators under CCC mandatory certification (SAMR/CNCA); (2) GB 19083-2010 for medical-protective masks (NMPA Class II medical device); (3) YY 0469-2011 for medical surgical masks (NMPA Class II medical device). The LA (labour-protection) certification baseline and the GB 2626 CCC scheme form the primary compliance baseline for industrial respirators exported from China.
summary.zh: 中国对呼吸口罩采用三轨分类：（1）GB 2626-2019（KN95/KN90）——工业/职业用呼吸器，实施强制性产品认证（CCC），由市场监管总局/国家认监委管理；（2）GB 19083-2010——医用防护口罩（国家药品监督管理局II类医疗器械）；（3）YY 0469-2011——医用外科口罩（国家药品监督管理局II类医疗器械）。劳动防护（LA）认证基准及GB 2626 CCC制度构成中国出口工业呼吸器的主要合规基础。
summary.zht: 中國對呼吸口罩採用三軌分類：（1）GB 2626-2019（KN95/KN90）——工業/職業用呼吸器，實施強制性產品認證（CCC），由市場監督管理總局/國家認監委管理；（2）GB 19083-2010——醫用防護口罩（國家藥品監督管理局II類醫療器械）；（3）YY 0469-2011——醫用外科口罩（國家藥品監督管理局II類醫療器械）。勞動防護（LA）認證基準及GB 2626 CCC制度構成中國出口工業呼吸器的主要合規基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Non-powered air-purifying particle respirator (KN95/KN90) — CCC mandatory, SAMR/CNCA
GB 19083-2010 — Technical requirements for medical protective mask — NMPA Class II
YY 0469-2011 — Medical surgical mask — Technical requirements — NMPA Class II

gap.en: Georgia does NOT apply EAEU TR CU 019/2011 — exporters who have only obtained EAC marking for EAEU markets (Russia, Kazakhstan, Belarus, etc.) cannot assume that mark covers Georgia. Georgia's GeoSTM-based national standards must be met independently. The degree of technical equivalence between Georgian-adopted GOST standards and Chinese GB 2626 varies by specific test parameter; direct acceptance of Chinese CCC certificates or test reports is not established. Exporters must engage with GeoSTM or an authorised Georgian conformity assessment body to confirm current applicable standards and certification pathway.
gap.zh: 格鲁吉亚不适用欧亚经济联盟TR CU 019/2011——仅获得EAC标志（面向俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦、白俄罗斯等欧亚经济联盟市场）的出口商不能认为该标志适用于格鲁吉亚。须独立满足格鲁吉亚GeoSTM国家标准的要求。格鲁吉亚采标的GOST标准与中国GB 2626之间的技术等效程度因具体测试参数而异；中国CCC证书或检测报告的直接接受尚未建立。出口商须与GeoSTM或授权的格鲁吉亚合格评定机构联系，确认现行适用标准及认证路径。
gap.zht: 格魯吉亞不適用歐亞經濟聯盟TR CU 019/2011——僅獲得EAC標誌（面向俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦、白俄羅斯等歐亞經濟聯盟市場）的出口商不能認為該標誌適用於格魯吉亞。須獨立滿足格魯吉亞GeoSTM國家標準的要求。格魯吉亞採標的GOST標準與中國GB 2626之間的技術等效程度因具體測試參數而異；中國CCC證書或檢測報告的直接接受尚未建立。出口商須與GeoSTM或授權的格魯吉亞合格評定機構聯繫，確認現行適用標準及認證路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GeoSTM national standards and conformity certification required; EAEU TR CU 019/2011 does not apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (GB 2626-2019) for industrial respirators; NMPA registration for medical-grade masks

source.publisher: GeoSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia is outside the EAEU — TR CU 019/2011 and EAC marking do not apply. Respiratory PPE for Georgia must satisfy GeoSTM national standards (GOST-based, with progressive EU approximation). Chinese CCC certificates and GB 2626 test reports are not automatically accepted. Confirm applicable GeoSTM standard versions and certification pathway with a Georgian conformity assessment body before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚在欧亚经济联盟以外——TR CU 019/2011和EAC标志不适用。面向格鲁吉亚的呼吸防护PPE须满足GeoSTM国家标准（以GOST为基础，逐步向欧盟靠拢）。中国CCC证书及GB 2626检测报告不被自动接受。出口前须与格鲁吉亚合格评定机构确认适用的GeoSTM标准版本及认证路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 格魯吉亞在歐亞經濟聯盟以外——TR CU 019/2011和EAC標誌不適用。面向格魯吉亞的呼吸防護PPE須滿足GeoSTM國家標準（以GOST為基礎，逐步向歐盟靠攏）。中國CCC證書及GB 2626檢測報告不被自動接受。出口前須與格魯吉亞合格評定機構確認適用的GeoSTM標準版本及認證路徑。
